parameters.jsCode:
const c = $('Code · State').first().json;
return [{ json: { ...c, userText: c.text || '' } }];

parameters.text:
=Stage: {{ $json.stage }}
Language: {{ $json.language }}
User message: "{{ $json.userText }}"

Classify the user message above. Return ONLY valid JSON: {"intent":"<ONE>","data":{}}.
AFFIRMATIVE = yes/ok/sure/done/good/great/agree — any positive reply to bot content.
WATCHED = watched/seen a video or content.
FORM_DONE = filled a form.
BOOKING = specific time or date mentioned (put in data.booking_time).
DELAY = not now/later/busy/vague postpone.
WANTS_MORE_INFO = tell me more/explain/details.
QUESTION = real product or service question (put cleaned question in data.question).
WANTS_HUMAN = speak to human/agent/person.
SHORT_NEUTRAL = only pure openers with zero other meaning: hi/hello/hey.
When in doubt between SHORT_NEUTRAL and AFFIRMATIVE, always prefer AFFIRMATIVE.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'Sure 🙏 connecting you to our advisor now. Someone will be with you shortly.', message_type: 'outgoing', private: false }) }}

parameters.url: ={{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_base }}/api/v1/accounts/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.chatwoot_account_id }}/conversations/{{ $('Code · Intent + flow').first().json.convId }}/labels

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ Id: $('Code · Prep lead').first().json.client_id, last_seen: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
